event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
NOTE: Early in the meet two controls (134, 129) were determined to be misplaced, and we recognize this negatively impacted a handful of early runners on course 3. In the spirit of Wednesday evening series being an opportunity to practice and grow (and given there are no series points or standings on the line), rather than voiding the legs going into and out of both of those controls, runners who were unable to punch were given credit. This allows the majority of runners with valid punches to still compare times on WinSplits, etc. Thanks also for everyone’s patience with the broken printer!
